title: mypy: 10 union-attr errors (accessing attrs on possibly-None)
description:
10 union-attr errors accessing attributes on potentially None values:
- src/lichen/interface/serial.py: lines 84-87, 116, 166 (self._serial may be None)
- src/lichen/interface/kiss/serial.py: lines 87-90, 114, 156 (same pattern)

Fix: Add None checks or use 'if self._serial is not None' guards before method calls.
